name: Garlic Squares
recipeIngredient: 2/4 cup (1 stick) butter plus 2 tbsp butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Gently sauté garlic and onions in 2/4 cup (1 stick) butter about 10 minutes until tender, but not brown.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a mixing bowl.
4. Cut in the remaining 2 tablespoons butter until mixture is crumbly like cornmeal.
5. Add parsley, dill, and milk; stir just until evenly moist.
6. Pour batter into a well-greased 8 x 8-inch pan.
7. Spread garlic and onions on top, then cover with cheese.
8. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Cool slightly and cut into squares.
